summary.title: Happy Apple Online Store
summary.description: E-Commerce full-stack project developed in Ruby on Rails 8.1, with BCrypt-based authentication (sign-up, login). Features include a personalized dashboard, a product gallery with price, description, and image per item, an "add to cart" button with persistent cart counter, a checkout flow capturing shipping address, phone number, and payment method, and order confirmation with order history per user.

diagrams.title: Happy Apple - Data Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Level 0 Data Flow Diagram showing the user, the Rails monolith, and the PostgreSQL database, including authentication, cart, and checkout flows.
